_meta.description: B13-PROXY: CodeClash Equivalent — 10 competitive coding tasks
_meta.selection_criteria: Algorithm problems with test suites, mixed difficulty, representative of competitive coding
_meta.note: PROXY lane — comparable to internal baselines only. NOT comparable to published CodeClash numbers.

tasks.description: Given an array of integers and a target, return indices of two numbers that add up to target
Implement an LRU cache with O(1) get and put operations
Given a collection of intervals, merge all overlapping intervals
Determine if a string can be segmented into dictionary words
Serialize and deserialize a binary tree
Find median from a data stream with O(log n) insertion
Determine if all courses can be completed given prerequisites (cycle detection)
Find the minimum window substring containing all characters of target
Determine if a string of brackets is valid
Find the longest palindromic substring in a given string
